page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.3xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the ecs.hfr7 family. It features 12 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at 3.3 GHz. The system is equipped with 96.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It operates on the KVM hypervisor and does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 4 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this instance in the average tier across most standard workloads. The Intel Xeon processor delivers a stress-ng single-core score of 1577.28 and a multi-core score of 12473.75. Memory performance is characterized by a read-only small block bandwidth of 698.81 GB/sec and a large block write bandwidth of 46.64 GB/sec. Database operations, measured via Redis SET benchmarks, reach 11.99 million operations per second, while static web serving throughput is recorded at 10.32 GB/sec. For machine learning tasks, the server achieves 767.53 tokens per second for small model prompt processing, though performance drops to a weak rating of 17.76 tokens per second when processing prompts on medium 7B models.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density without the added cost of local NVMe storage or GPU accelerators, this server offers a balanced cost-to-resource profile for memory-intensive workloads. It is well-suited for database operations, in-memory caching systems like Redis, static web serving, and moderate multi-threaded data decompression tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.3xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 12 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at 3.3 GHz. It is configured with 96.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high 8.0 GB per core ratio, and operates on the KVM hypervisor. The instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, and features a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. Benchmark data indicates average performance across standard operations, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 12473.75 and Redis SET performance reaching 11.99 million operations per second. Memory bandwidth is solid, registering 698.81 GB/sec for small block reads. This hardware profile is highly suitable for memory-intensive workloads, including in-memory databases, caching layers, static web serving, and moderate data processing tasks where dedicated CPU resources and high memory density are required without the overhead of local storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.3xlarge is a memory-optimized server with 12 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 96 GB RAM, and 4 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for database and in-memory caching workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.3xlarge is a memory-optimized server featuring 12 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 96 GB RAM on a KVM hypervisor.
tagline: A dedicated twelve-core Intel Xeon server with high memory density for database operations and in-memory caching workloads.
bullet_points: 12 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369HB physical cores running at 3.3 GHz
96.0 GB of RAM providing a high 8.0 GB per core memory ratio
Delivers 11.99 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks
4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Optimized for in-memory databases, caching, and static web serving
